zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Mobberley於1323年出生在英國爾莫波利時，她的父親William Mobberly40歲，母親Maud Downes44歲。她和John Domville至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1400年在英國英格蘭爾享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Mobberley于1323年出生在英国爾莫波利时，她的父亲William Mobberly40岁，母亲Maud Downes44岁。她和John Domville至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1400年在英国英格兰爾享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mobberley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moverley
meanings: English: a Yorks variant of   Mobberley  .

variants.name: Moberly
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from Mobberley in Cheshire. The placename derives from Old English mōt ‘meeting’ + burg ‘fortress’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Moberley
meanings: English (Worcestershire and Hampshire): variant of   Moberly  .

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Mobberley was born in 1323, in Mobberley, Cheshire, England, her father, William Mobberly, was 40 and her mother, Maud Downes, was 44. She had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with John Domville. She died in 1400, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Mobberley est née en 1323, à Mobberley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William Mobberly, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Maud Downes, avait 44 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec John Domville. Elle est décédée en 1400, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Mobberley 1323 in Mobberley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Mobberly 40 und ihre Mutter Maud Downes 44. Sie hatte mit John Domville mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1400 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Mobberley è nata il nel 1323 nel Mobberley, Cheshire, England, sua padre, William Mobberly, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Maud Downes, aveva 44 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con John Domville. Morì nel 1400, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Mobberleyが1323年にイギリスチェシュアイアモバーリーで生まれた時，父William Mobberlyは40歳，母Maud Downesは44歳であった。彼女はJohn Domvilleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1400年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Mobberley(이)가 1323년 영국 체실르 모브벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Mobberly(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Downes(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 John Domville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Mobberley nasceu em 1323, em Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Mobberly, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Maud Downes, tinha 44 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com John Domville. Ela faleceu em 1400, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Mobberley родилась в 1323 г. в местности моббирли, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Mobberly было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Downes, 44. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от John Domville. Она умерла в 1400 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Mobberley nació en 1323, en Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Mobberly, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Maud Downes, tenía 44 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con John Domville. Murió en 1400, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años.
